title: entolasia marginata
intro: Entolasia marginata is a type of grass plant native to Australia, belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Entolasia marginata include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and fighting off infections. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea or infused in hot water, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
